intro: Tragacantha alexeenkoana, also known as Astragalus alexeenkoanus, is a perennial plant species belonging to the legume family (Fabaceae). It has been traditionally used in medicine for its anti-inflammatory and immunomodulatory properties, which may help to alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections, improve wound healing, and enhance overall immune function. The bioactive constituents of Tragacantha alexeenkoana include flavonoids, saponins, and polysaccharides, which are responsible for its medicinal properties.
